world.title: Man who shot dead seven of his children in US identified

world.title: U.K police investigating if attacks in London are the work of Iranian proxies
world.description: U.K. police said Sunday they are investigating whether a string of arson attacks on Jewish sites in London are the work of Iranian proxies, the latest of which caused minor damage on Saturday night.

world.title: Veep urges Ghanaians in Spain to seize new immigration amnesty
world.description: Vice President Professor Jane Naana Opoku-Agyemang has called on Ghanaians living in Spain to take full advantage of a newly announced immigration amnesty by the Spanish government, which is expected to regularise the status of about 500,000 undocumented migrants.

world.title: UK visa reforms trigger international student slump, raise sanctions fears at universities
world.description: Many UK universities anticipate sanctions due to new visa compliance rules. This is impacting international student numbers, with significant drops reported for postgraduate admissions. Stricter visa measures are set to begin soon. Universities are already tightening admission processes and increasing financial checks. This situation could deter genuine students and harm the UK's higher education standing globally.

business.title: Increase in renewable energy curbs emissions growth in 2025, IEA says
business.description: Global emissions growth slowed in 2025. Solar power expansion in developing nations helped balance emissions increases in advanced economies. India saw emissions fall for the first time in normal economic conditions. China also recorded lower emissions due to leading solar capacity additions. The United States experienced an emissions rise.

science.title: Global proteomics data sharing grows fast as ProteomeXchange scales up
science.description: ProteomeXchange’s 2026 update shows that global proteomics data sharing continues to accelerate, with more than 64,000 datasets submitted and nearly half added in just the last three years. The paper also highlights how standards, reuse tools, and AI-ready resources are helping make mass spectrometry proteomics data more findable, accessible, and reusable.

ai.title: Bloom Agency Combines AI SEO Services With Expertise as a Leading SEO Company in Mumbai
ai.description: Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], April 20: With rapid technological changes in the digital world, the need for a higher position on search engines has become a must rather than a choice. Companies from Mumbai are encountering difficulties in not only getting their message to the right people but also keeping their existence known and turning website visitors into customers. As one of the leading SEO Company in Mumbai, Bloom Agency integrates AI SEO services with human touch to tackle these issues much more efficiently. Using all the latest kinds of AI SEO Services, Bloom Agency helps companies to stay ahead in search results by enabling them to make smarter decisions, increase a lot more efficiency, and remain competitive.
